rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF ALEXIS SANTIAGO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required by counsel and the guardian. second amended accounting still does not begin on the date of appointment, no report, no schedule of property on hand, no proposed order delivered. Counsel must prepare and bring a proposed order to the court. it is noted that no attorney fees are requested in the petition. fees, if any, must be requested at the time an accounting is presented (see Local Rule 14.88.B.).

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHARLIE EVERRETT STEVENSON & ALDONIE STEVENSON REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Confirming Real Property Is An Asset Of The Charlie Stevenson And Aldonia Stevenson Revocable Trust Dated August 19 2010 For Authority To Sell Trust Real Property Located At 347 Orizaba Avenue San Francisco Ca And For Authority To Enter Into Exclusive Listing Agreement With Pat Rock Coldwell Banker
rulings.Rulings: continued to april 16, 2018 for proper notice of the amended petition as follows: Probate Code section 851(b) requires a copy of the petition to be sent along with the notice and Probate Code section 851(c)(1) now requires the Notice of Hearing include a description of all subject properties. If notice is mailed no later than 3/17 and proof of service filed by 4/11/18, this matter will be set for an appearance on 4/16/18.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF HERBERT D. CROSS
rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 4/4/18 at Counsel's request per Post-It Note (for publication). No proposed order. Items 3f(3) and 8 of the petition are incomplete. Item 8 fails to disclose who the trustee of the devisee trust is, or, if it is the petitioner, who the trust beneficiaries are. The other named co-executor has not declined. The Notice does not reflect that the will is lost. No evidence has been submitted to overcome the presumption of revocation.
